methodology.allergens: Essential-only tagging from a 16-tag vocabulary (Celery, Gluten, Crustaceans, Fish, Eggs, Lupin, Molluscs, Mustard, Nuts, Peanuts, Sesame, Soya, Sulphites, Sugared drink, Dairy, Lentils). Healthy-cuisine mapping: oats -> Gluten (most commercial oats not certified GF); almond milk/butter -> Nuts; oat milk -> Gluten; coconut milk -> none; soy milk/tofu/tempeh/edamame/miso/teriyaki/gochujang -> Soya (soy sauce/teriyaki/miso/yakisoba/bulgogi/bibimbap also -> Gluten); tahini/sesame/furikake -> Sesame; salmon/tuna/dory/smoked salmon -> Fish; shrimp/prawn -> Crustaceans; squid/octopus -> Molluscs; Greek/regular yogurt + halloumi/feta/paneer/ricotta/cream cheese/cottage -> Dairy; egg/mayo/kewpie/omelette/tamago/shakshuka/cilbir -> Eggs; falafel/hummus/chickpeas/lentils/black beans/kidney beans -> Lentils; explicit mustard/dijon -> Mustard; celery (explicit) -> Celery. Dates -> NO Sulphites. Empty -> ['NO_ALLERGENS'].
methodology.calories: Per-recipe kcal taken from the source sheet's DISH TOTAL kcal column where present (authoritative, kitchen-verified). Where derivation was needed, a healthy-cuisine per-100g reference table was used (quinoa cooked 120, brown rice cooked 112, chicken breast 165, salmon 208, tuna 132, tofu 76, Greek yogurt 59, halloumi 321, feta 264, avocado 160, olive oil 884, tahini 595, almond butter 614, hummus 166, falafel 333, chickpeas cooked 164, lentils cooked 116, etc.). Pieces priced via per-piece table (egg 72, lemon 17, kiwi 42, avocado 240, tortilla 145). Packaging excluded. Wastage NOT applied to calories. Rounded to int.
methodology.wastage_pct: Wastage stored as decimal fraction (10% -> 0.10). Values >1 in source were treated as percentage and divided by 100.
